arts.ttl: Premier League offer explanation on VAR red card controversy in Liverpool vs Everton
arts.sum: Everton defender James Tarkowski was left sweating during the early stages of the Merseyside derby after his heavy challenge on Liverpool's Alexis Mac Allister was reviewed by VAR

arts.ttl: James Tarkowski is 'very lucky' to avoid a red card for 'potential leg breaker' tackle on Alexis Mac Allister, insists Gary Neville - after Everton captain's challenge on Liverpool star
arts.sum: Gary Neville claimed that Everton defender James Tarkowski was fortunate not to be sent off for a challenge on Liverpool's Alexis Mac Allister in the Merseyside derby.

arts.ttl: Liverpool receive transfer boost in bid to sign €60m La Liga star
arts.sum: Liverpool have looked to shop in La Liga in recent years, and they could look to do so again in 2025 in their bid to replace Mohamed Salah, who could leave the club when his contract expires at the end of the season. Last summer, Liverpool came desperately close to signing Martin Zubimendi, but after […] The post Liverpool receive transfer boost in bid to sign €60m La Liga star appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Liverpool host Everton in the Merseyside derby as they look to extend their PL lead
arts.sum: Liverpool host Everton in the Merseyside derby as the look to regain their winning form. ESPN has live updates.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Everton: Time, how to watch, stats, team news
arts.sum: Everything you need to know about Wednesday's Merseyside derby at Anfield as Liverpool face Everton in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Juventus star Andrea Cambiaso’s agent speaks of Manchester City and Liverpool links
arts.sum: Serie A giants Juventus have seen Andrea Cambiaso get linked with a move to Manchester City and Liverpool since the January transfer window. His agent had confirmed that the Citizens…

arts.ttl: Liverpool make decision on Alexander Isak pursuit
arts.sum: Liverpool have come to a decision on their summer pursuit of Newcastle striker Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: Everton get huge injury boost as David Moyes names XI for Liverpool
arts.sum: David Moyes has named his Everton XI for the clash with Liverpool at Anfield

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Everton: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8pm BST kick-off Clockwatch: Man City v Leicester and more – live Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | Email Michael Arne Slot, Liverpool’s manager, talks: We follow the [concussion'] protocol [with Alisson, who got a knock to the head on Brazil duty]. He is not ready but the good news is that we have Caoimhin [Kelleher]. He is perhaps too good to be Ali’s back up, but it’s good that he plays tonight. Nine games to go but we are taking it one game at a time. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Alisson is ruled OUT of Merseyside derby as Arne Slot rolls dice with surprise pick at right-back for Liverpool's clash with Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool will be without Alisson for Wednesday's Merseyside Derby after the Brazil No 1 failed a late concussion test. Caoimhin Kelleher is to deputise in goal again after playing the Carabao Cup final.
